overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a journey from mountain highways through a tunnel into a rainy futuristic metropolis with dense urban infrastructure, overpasses, and neon-lit commercial districts.

segments.scene_description: Driving on a mountain highway with guardrails and distant peaks visible. Rain begins to fall around the 2-second mark, and the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance while following a white sedan.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel with artificial overhead lighting, creating an enclosed environment. The tunnel walls flank both sides as the vehicle follows the white sedan toward the distant exit.

overtaking a large commercial truck on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into rainy conditions, the vehicle drives on wet reflective asphalt with the futuristic city skyline now visible in the distance. The car overtakes a large truck on the right while mountains continue to line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses

navigating curved ramp under and around overpasses

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a complex highway interchange with massive concrete overpasses and support pillars. Navigating curved ramps, the city skyline grows closer while the surrounding landscape transitions from natural to purely urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city streets with commercial buildings and digital signage

slowing for intersection with traffic signals and cross traffic

segments.scene_description: Driving through the dense urban core with commercial buildings flanking both sides, digital billboards, and palm trees lining the wet streets. The vehicle navigates city intersections with construction barriers visible on the right, while pedestrians appear on sidewalks and the futuristic skyline looms directly ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transforms from a rainy mountain highway into the dense, neon-lit core of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by following a white sedan along a mountain road flanked by distant peaks as rain starts to fall, moving steadily toward a concrete tunnel entrance. As the vehicle enters the tunnel, the open landscape is replaced by an enclosed environment of artificial overhead lighting before the camera emerges back into the rain onto wet, reflective asphalt. The scene then expands as the vehicle overtakes a large truck and navigates a complex interchange of massive concrete overpasses, shifting the surroundings from natural mountains to heavy urban infrastructure. Finally, the camera glides into the city center, passing digital billboards, palm trees, and construction barriers while the towering skyline looms directly ahead.
